name: Eggplant Caviar Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp fresh basil (chopped), or 1 tbsp fresh parsley (minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise.
2. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 400°F for 60 minutes with the cut side down.
3. Allow the eggplant to cool, then gently squeeze out excess water using a spoon.
4. Scoop the pulp into a bowl and mash it with a fork.
5. Crush the garlic using a garlic press.
6. Add the crushed garlic and all other ingredients to the mashed eggplant pulp.
7. Mix well and cover before chilling.
8. This recipe makes about 3 1/2 cups of dip.
9. Suggested dippers: Sesame crackers, lavash crackers, cocktail rye bread, scallions, bell peppers.
